articles.title: DEV-FRIENDLY
articles.summary: Every growing B2B SaaS needs solid auth and user management. The problem? Building it in-house drains engineering resources from the product your customers actually use.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC RAISES $13B SERIES F AT $183B POST-MONEY VALUATION
articles.summary: Anthropic raised $13 billion in a Series F round, valuing the company at $183 billion. Significant investors include ICONIQ, Fidelity, and Lightspeed. This funding will support growing enterprise demand, safety research, and international expansion.

articles.title: VIJAYE RAJI TO BECOME CTO OF APPLICATIONS WITH ACQUISITION OF STATSIG
articles.summary: OpenAI has acquired Statsig and named its founder, Vijaye Raji, as CTO of Applications. Raji will oversee ChatGPT and Codex engineering. The acquisition strengthens OpenAI's experimentation capabilities, enhancing product development and responsiveness. Statsig will operate independently in Seattle, with continuity for current customers.

articles.title: WHEN SHOULD FOUNDERS SELL THEIR SHARES?
articles.summary: Secondary sales hit $162 billion in 2024, up 45% from the previous year, with founders increasingly cashing out small portions during funding rounds - Revolut's CEO just sold $200-350 million while companies like Stripe, Databricks, and OpenAI run regular employee liquidity programs. The old taboo against founder secondaries has died because IPOs now take 10+ years, and founders need basic financial stability, but the key is moderation.

articles.title: FROM ZERO TO $25B IN 17 YEARS: THE INSIDE STORY OF HUBSPOT'S DOMINATION STRATEGY
articles.summary: HubSpot's success stems from its focus on predictable, compounding growth through inbound marketing and platform development. Expanding from a marketing automation tool to a comprehensive system of record, HubSpot increased customer retention and ARPU. Strategic acquisitions and significant R&D investments further solidified its position, creating sustainable competitive advantages and continual growth.

articles.title: YOUR COMPLETE GUIDE TO REVENUE LEAKAGE
articles.summary: Revenue leakage, the gap between potential and collected revenue, often occurs due to system misalignments across sales, finance, and customer service. Common causes include missed invoices, unintended discounts, churned customers still receiving service, and untracked credit memos. Identifying and addressing these leaks is crucial for maintaining revenue integrity and ensuring organizational efficiency.

articles.title: WHY TODAY'S BEST CFOS THINK LIKE FOUNDERS
articles.summary: Modern CFOs act as business operators, focusing on turning capital into outcomes rather than just financial reporting. They prioritize strategic judgment, guide growth decisions, and align business metrics with execution goals. A CFO who thinks like a founder can provide clarity amidst startup chaos, enabling faster, more effective decision-making.

articles.title: @ZEST IS THE AI AGENT THAT LETS YOU _ACTUALLY_ RUN YOUR BUSINESS FROM SLACK
articles.summary: Entire companies live on Slack. But to make things happen, companies need Gmail, Linear, HubSpot, etc. — which means context switching and coordination problems. Zest AI helps make Slack your everything app [11]: Simply _@Zest_ to search for an answer, create a Linear issue, retrieve knowledge from Notion, or anything else. Start in 2

articles.title: JINEAR
articles.summary: Jinear is an open-source, self-hostable task manager and calendar app built for small teams and privacy-conscious users to manage projects, tasks, and schedules collaboratively.

articles.title: DRDROID
articles.summary: DrDroid is an AI-powered on-call assistant that automates incident triage, troubleshooting, and fixes by integrating with 50+ ops tools to help engineers resolve production issues faster.

articles.title: ZERO
articles.summary: Zero is an AI-powered email client that drafts replies, summarizes threads, extracts action items, and helps manage inboxes with lightning-fast keyboard navigation and smart, personalized workflows.

articles.title: 12 BOOKS FOR THE BUSY FOUNDER
articles.summary: This post recommends 12 essential books for startup founders tackling initial challenges that emphasize customer development and achieving product-market fit. They include "Running Lean" by Ash Maurya for Lean Startup methodologies and "Effectual Entrepreneurship" by Saras Sarasvathy on venture growth. It is important to focus on discontinuous innovation, building relationships, understanding customer perspectives, and iterating based on real offers to refine products and business strategies.

articles.title: BUILDING A 60% AI TEAM: EFFICIENT, PROFITABLE, AND SURPRISINGLY LONELY
articles.summary: SaaStr has transitioned to a workforce comprising 60% AI, significantly boosting efficiency and output at a reduced cost. Key functions handled by AI have tripled content production, managed over 100,000 chat interactions, and built substantial sales pipelines. The shift raises questions about maintaining company culture, as AI teams bring productivity but lack the human energy and interaction that traditional teams offer.

articles.title: THE ONE NICHE PROGRAMMING SKILL THAT VCS ARE POURING MILLIONS INTO (AND IT'S NOT AI)
articles.summary: VCs are heavily investing in formal verification, a niche programming skill that uses mathematical models to ensure software reliability beyond traditional testing. Companies like Certik and Quantstamp leverage formal verification for blockchain security, while AWS employs it for cloud infrastructure stability. This critical skill, integral to high-stakes applications like AI safety, attracts significant funding as it promises unbreakable software and a future built on trust.

articles.title: AI AGENT STARTUPS ARE BECOMING REVENUE MACHINES — HERE ARE THE TOP 20 RANKED
articles.summary: AI agent startups are rapidly scaling with several, like Anysphere and Moveworks, exceeding $100M ARR.

articles.title: WHAT MAKES A GREAT AI COMPANION?
articles.summary: Platforms like Genies, Grok, and Woebot offer customizable avatars with dynamic behaviors.

articles.title: OPENAI URGES CALIFORNIA TO HARMONIZE AI RULES, AVOID REGULATORY PATCHWORK
articles.summary: OpenAI called on Governor Newsom to align California's AI regulations with emerging federal and global safety frameworks, such as the EU AI Code of Practice and CAISI agreements, to avoid fragmented rules that could slow innovation.
